Room Guide

🛏️ Bedroom Decor

A bedroom should feel like a place to exhale. These guides cover the color palettes, textures, and small styling choices that turn a bedroom into a genuine sanctuary, from calming sage green to warm terracotta and cheerful butter yellow.

Sage green is the bedroom color of 2026. Calm, grounded, and timelessly beautiful. Here are 12 ways to design a sage green bedroom that feels like a sanctuary.

Butter Yellow Bedroom Ideas: 12 Ways to Bring the Color of the Year Into Your Bedroom

Butter yellow has become the color of the year. These 12 butter yellow bedroom ideas show how to use this warm, cheerful shade through paint, bedding, and accents for a calming, sunlit space.
